title: alectorolophus apenninus
intro: Alectorolophus apenninus, also known as Alectryon apenninus, is a plant species belonging to the family Sapindaceae. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Alectorolophus apenninus include the treatment of digestive issues, fever reduction, and skin conditions such as eczema and acne. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
